name: planboard
description: Turn a rough idea into a complete project specification before writing any code
author: PlanBoard

commands.name: planboard
commands.description: Start or resume a PlanBoard planning session

commands.name: approve
commands.description: Approve a PLANNER/ file and continue the planning sequence

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show the current status of all PLANNER/ files

commands.name: consistency
commands.description: Run a cross-file consistency check across all PLANNER/ documents

commands.name: finalize
commands.description: Compile all approved PLANNER/ files into CLAUDE.md

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Reset a PLANNER/ file back to pending so it can be rewritten
